33.reason: [Digits are added before multiplying by 10, leading to incorrect number parsing (e.g., "12" becomes (0+1)*10 + (1+2) = 13). Should multiply first then add.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.07692307692307693 , reason:  [Digits are added before multiplying by 10, leading to incorrect number parsing (e.g., "12" becomes (0+1)*10 + (1+2) = 13 instead of 12). Should multiply first then add.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.08333333333333333 , reason:  [Digits are added before multiplying by 10, leading to incorrect number parsing (e.g., "12" becomes (0+1)*10 + (1+2) = 13). Should multiply first then add.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.08333333333333333 , reason:  [Logic error: digit accumulation is incorrect. Should multiply existing value by 10 before adding new digit, not after checking next char]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.05263157894736842 , reason:  [Logic error: digit accumulation is incorrect. Should first multiply by 10 then add new digit, not the other way around. Also `a[x]` is uninitialized.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.06666666666666667 , reason:  [Logic error: digit accumulation is incorrect. Should multiply existing value by 10 before adding new digit, not after checking next char]
